There's no git repo wrapping the top-level `/home/clungus/work/` directory, so that file can't be committed separately. The canonical copy for ops context lives in `claude-config/CLAUDE.md` (which was committed), and the `/mnt/data/CLAUDE.md` is the project-level context file.
